subject: [PATCH 5/7 v2] mm/memcontrol: optimize memsw stock for cgroup v1

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch optimizes the way memory usage is tracked in cgroup v1 by introducing a new stock for the memsw page counter, which is charged independently from the memory page counter. This change improves caching and reduces the number of hierarchical charges required, especially in scenarios where both counters are over their limit. As a result, reported memsw usage may temporarily be lower than memory usage due to batching of stock charges.
